mnemonics.title: Word2Vec Models
mnemonics.content: CBOW: Context Before Output Word. Skip-Gram: Skips grammar, grabs relationships.

acronyms.usage: Remember it combines GLOBAL statistics with vector (Ve) representations

visualTips.visualization: Imagine words as cities on a map - related words cluster together, directions represent relationships

analogies.analogy: Like GPS coordinates for words - position determines relationships
